description: Climate FieldView is a digital agriculture platform for farm and field data, including boundaries, fields, agronomic uploads, exports, and operational records. Its developer offering is a partner platform for integrating with growers' FieldView data.
summary: Climate.com exposes one partner-oriented HTTP REST API surface: the Climate FieldView Platform APIs at https://platform.climate.com/, authenticated with both a FieldView OAuth bearer token and a partner API key.
